zh.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Orreby於1232年出生在英國爾加福斯沃斯時，他的父親Philip de Orreby II42歲，母親Leuca de Mohaut30歲。他於1285年之前與Cicely de Massey在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年1月8日在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Orreby于1232年出生在英国爾加福斯沃斯时，他的父亲Philip de Orreby II42岁，母亲Leuca de Mohaut30岁。他于1285年之前与Cicely de Massey在英国爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年1月8日在英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Orreby was born in 1232, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, his father, Philip de Orreby II, was 42 and his mother, Leuca de Mohaut, was 30. He married Cicely de Massey before 1285, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 8 January 1289, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Orreby est né en 1232, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Orreby II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Leuca de Mohaut, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Cicely de Massey avant 1285, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1289, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Orreby 1232 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Orreby II 42 und seine Mutter Leuca de Mohaut 30. Er hat vor 1285 in Cheshire, England Cicely de Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1289 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Cicely de Massey prima del 1285, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1289, nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orrebyが1232年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Philip de Orreby IIは42歳，母Leuca de Mohautは30歳であった。1285年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアでCicely de Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年1月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Orreby(이)가 1232년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Orreby II(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Leuca de Mohaut(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1285년 이전 영국 체실르에서 Cicely de Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Orreby родился в 1232 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip de Orreby II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Leuca de Mohaut, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely de Massey перед 1285 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 8 января 1289 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
